title: FactorioCraft
description: Create-based modpack specifically designed to create Factorio in Minecraft
body:
Create-based modpack designed to create **Factorio in Minecraft**, ideal for those who enjoy more modern factories, including _Oil Processing, Steel Processing, Warfare, Electrical Power Grids_, as well as some fun foods like _Fries, Stroopwafels, Churros, Hot Dogs_, and more.

Also includes some QoL mods such as trash cans _(to erase items)_, **Storage Drawers**, and **Xaero**'s maps, along with **Terralith** to liven up the terrain.

For Minecraft version **1.19.2**

Do **not** update any mods!
